# Master Etsy Listing Description Standard

Version: 1.0
Date: 2026-03-04
Scope: Deterministic generation of Etsy digital artwork descriptions for ArtLomo

## 1) Objective

This standard defines deterministic rules to generate Etsy listing descriptions that are:

- Etsy-compliant

- SEO-aware (Etsy + Google)

- Mobile-readable

- Brand-consistent (Robin Custance voice)

- Safe for automation pipelines

This document is authoritative for description structure, content, output contract, and failure signalling.

## 2) Hard Platform Constraints

- Etsy description text must be plain text only.

- Do not output HTML tags (`<p>`, `<br>`, `<h2>`, `<div>`, etc.).

- Use short paragraphs and clear line breaks.

- Optimise for narrow/mobile reading width (about 56 chars visual width).

- Avoid long unbroken lines and dense text blocks.

## 3) Brand Voice Rules

Required tone:

- Warm

- Intelligent

- Authentic

- Calm

- Slightly poetic

- Subtle Australian character

- Gentle humour (light touch)

Avoid:

- Hype language

- Cliches

- Overly spiritual claims

- Pretentious or inflated claims

Voice anchor:

- Sound like a thoughtful Australian artist speaking to a gallery visitor.

## 4) Deterministic Description Blueprint (Mandatory Order)

Every description must render these 11 sections in this exact order.

1. Emotional Hook

1. Artwork Story

1. Interior Placement Vision

1. Product Format Explanation

1. File Quality & Resolution

1. Print Size Table

1. Printing Recommendations

1. Download Instructions

1. Artist Section

1. Copyright Section

1. Thank You Closing

### 4.1 Emotional Hook

- Purpose: immediate emotional connection.

- Content: atmosphere, place, light, landscape feeling.

- Length: 3 to 6 sentences.

### 4.2 Artwork Story

- Purpose: meaning and authenticity.

- Include: place inspiration, personal context, cultural context when relevant, artist perspective.

- Length: 2 to 4 short paragraphs.

### 4.3 Interior Placement Vision

- Purpose: buyer visualisation in real spaces.

- Mention likely placements such as: living room, entryway, studio, bedroom, calm workspace.

### 4.4 Product Format Explanation

Must explicitly state:

- Digital download

- No physical shipping

- Buyer can print locally or via online service

### 4.5 File Quality & Resolution

Must include these facts in plain language:

- 14,400 px long edge

- 300 DPI

- Prints up to 48 inches (122 cm)

- High-resolution JPG

### 4.7 Printing Recommendations

Recommend at least:

- Fine art paper

- Canvas

- Matte paper

- Archival inks

Can include examples like Officeworks, Gelato, Printful, local photo labs.

### 4.8 Download Instructions

Render as simple 3-step flow:

1. Purchase artwork

1. Download from Etsy

1. Print and frame

### 4.9 Artist Section

Short artist bio must include:

- South Australian artist

- Landscape inspiration

- Connection to Country (respectful wording)

### 4.10 Copyright Section

Render exactly:

```text

### 4.8 Download Instructions (14)

Render as simple 3-step flow:

1. Purchase artwork

1. Download from Etsy

1. Print and frame

### 4.9 Artist Section (14)

Short artist bio must include:

- South Australian artist

- Landscape inspiration

- Connection to Country (respectful wording)

### 4.10 Copyright Section (14)

Render exactly:

```text
Personal use only.

Resale or commercial use prohibited.

© Robin Custance
All rights reserved.
```

## 9) Failure Conditions

Treat as failure when any of these occur:

- API or transport error

- Timeout

- Token limit overflow

- Empty response

- Truncated/incomplete sections

- Invalid output schema

- Refusal/safety block

- Unreadable image

- Internal parser exception

## 10) Deterministic Validation Checklist

A generated description is valid only if all are true:

- Output status is `SUCCESS`

- All 11 sections exist in required order

- Includes required technical values (14,400 px, 300 DPI, 48 inches)

- Includes copyright block exactly

- Plain text only (no HTML)

- Passes minimum readability constraints (short paragraphs, no long dense blocks)

If any check fails, emit failure response and trigger retry pipeline handling.
